name: F.A. Whip Crosser
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｆ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フォーミュラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ウィップクロッサー
desc: Gains ATK equal to its Level x 300. Your opponent must pay 300 LP to activate the effect of a monster whose original Level/Rank is lower than this card's Level. Each time a "F.A." Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated: You can increase this card's Level by 1. If this card is Level 7 or higher, your opponent cannot discard or send cards from their hand to the GY to activate a card effect.
mnst_eff: Gains ATK equal to its Level x 300. Your opponent must pay 300 LP to activate the effect of a monster whose original Level/Rank is lower than this card's Level. Each time a "F.A." Spell/Trap Card or effect is activated: You can increase this card's Level by 1. If this card is Level 7 or higher, your opponent cannot discard or send cards from their hand to the GY to activate a card effect.

action: Must pay cost to activate cards or effects
life_points: Your opponent pays Life Points for cost
